data.name: Company has an approved Physical Security Policy
data.description:
This test verifies that your company has an approved [Physical Security Policy](/policies/physical-security-policy-bsi) in Vanta.

> **Physical Security Policy (BSI)**: Defines the measures used to protect physical access to company facilities, systems, and data from unauthorized individuals or environmental hazards.
data.failureDescription: You don't have an approved Physical Security Policy yet.
data.remediationDescription: Use our [policy templates](/policies?policy=Physical%20Security%20Policy) to create and approve a custom Physical Security Policy for your company.
